name: A2A Request + Skill Bridge
description: OpenClaw tool plugin: network-first A2A request w/ fallback + formal A2A skill invocation bridge (a2a.* verbs -> HTTP API).

sidecarUrl.description: Optional override for the local A2A sidecar base URL (default: http://127.0.0.1:17888).

sidecarSocketPath.description: Optional Unix socket path for the local A2A sidecar (preferred when set). Example: ~/.openclaw/a2a/sidecar.sock

relayUrl.description: Optional override for A2A relay WebSocket URL (wss://...).

defaultTarget.description: Optional default remote node id to target when params.target is missing.
